---
title: "Photogrammetry demo"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script type="module" src="content/photogrammetry.js"></script>
---

```{ojs}
viewof my_3d_canvas = {
  const canvas = html`<canvas width="800" height="800"></canvas>`;

  const { createTruck } = await import("../../content/photogrammetry.js");
  createTruck(canvas);

  return canvas;
}
```
